name: favorite_list
_note: favorite_list returns the caller's pinned recipes newest-first from the per-user STATE favorites map (keyed by ctx.actor.id). Always ok:true; favorites is empty for a caller who has pinned nothing. count === favorites.length. Each entry carries recipeId + recipeName + recipeType + favoritedAt. The MineTab builds a Set from favorites[].recipeId. Live actor reality, never no_db.
